ogTitle: Crescent Head vs Cringila: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crescent Head and Cringila.
heading: Crescent Head vs Cringila — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crescent Head, New South Wales and Cringila, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cringila has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Crescent Head (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crescent Head or Cringila safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crescent Head has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Cringila scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crescent Head scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Cringila scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crescent Head or Cringila?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cringila has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
